title: High-frequency spinal cord stimulation at 10 kHz for widespread pain: a retrospective survey of outcomes from combined cervical and thoracic electrode placements
study_question: Long-term outcomes of HF10-SCS for widespread upper and lower body neuropathic/nociplastic pain.
population_assessed: Patients with widespread upper and lower body neuropathic/nociplastic pain syndromes, including fibromyalgia.
outcome_measures: NRS pain, disability, employment, opioid use, satisfaction, adverse events
inclusion_criteria: Widespread upper and lower body neuropathic/nociplastic pain; trialed combined cervical and thoracic HF10-SCS leads.
answer_to_study_question: HF10-SCS produced sustained pain reduction, improved disability, employment, opioid reduction, high satisfaction, no long-term adverse events.
